sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n80380" key="peisth/r" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πεισ-τήρ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῆρος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">πείθομαι</etym>) <sense id="n80380.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one who obeys</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
